Trusted by

How we maintain the best prices

  • We have over 100 DEXs connected to our platform.
  • We offer exclusive liquidity powered by our private liquidity pool.
  • We support 3 DEX aggregators: 1inch, 0x, and the Changelly smart router.
  • We provide access to over 3600 exotic DeFi tokens.
  • We will implement cross-chain bridges soon.

What makes the Pure DeFi aggregator different

Varied selection of tokens

Get access to a wide selection of exotic DeFi tokens and revel in the best prices in the entire market.

Instant exchange

As soon as the transaction is confirmed on the blockchain, the user gets their tokens, and the partner receives the reward.

No intermediaries

The user interacts with a smart contract, which defines the rules of the exchange. Therefore, Changelly does not store user funds at the time of exchange.

Best rates through smart routing

Changelly integrated the top-tier liquidity aggregators — 1inch and 0x — so that our smart router can select the best possible route for transactions for the best prices in the market.

SOON

Cross-chain bridges

We will be rolling out decentralized cross-chain bridges with the support of a smart router that finds the most optimal routes among DEXs and bridges for exchanges between various networks.

SOON

Single-currency rewards

Reward payments in a single currency, such as USDT or ETH, will soon be available. Stay tuned!

Our partners

With Changelly's stellar team, we have developed a unique system to ensure exchanges are fulfilled in the fastest possible time and with immediate customer support.

FAQ API

What is Pure DeFi?

Pure DeFi — a DEX aggregator with over 100 DEXs (decentralized exchanges) connected to it — provides users with the best exchange prices and access to over 3600 tokens. At the same time, the exchange is facilitated by a smart contract, which is open source. Thus, the blockchain itself ensures the reliability and transparency of the exchange.

Why are exchanges available only within one network?

Currently, the integration works only with decentralized exchanges (DEXs), which allows exchanges only within one network (for example, Ethereum). Soon we will integrate decentralized cross-chain bridges that will enable exchanges through different blockchain networks as well.

How do I earn money with the Pure DeFi API?

We offer our API partners an extra-fee payment model: you are welcome to choose an extra fee that will be added on top of the Changelly exchange fee. The extra fee is credited within the same user transaction, meaning you will get the rewards immediately and on-chain.

Where can I find the relevant API documentation?

You can find all the relevant API documentation here.

How do I get my API keys?

To get the API keys, create an account with Changelly (or log in if you already have one) and send the following information to pro@changelly.com: the email address of your Changelly account, a brief description of your project into which you are planning to integrate the Changelly API, and the link to your project.

What if I have additional questions?

If you have any questions, please contact our team at pro@changelly.com.
